summary: Iteration 42: Frontend visual design verification complete. All tested features are working correctly - Success Stories shows 4-column grid on desktop (xl:grid-cols-4) with strong gradient headers, compact text (text-[11px]), and emerald outcome footers. ReportView displays coloured header bands based on report type (green for Quick Summary, blue gradient for Full Detailed, purple gradient for Extensive Log), case strength circle, table of contents, and case overview section all render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ReportView.jsx (lines 124-155) correctly defines report type configurations with coloured headers: quick_summary=bg-green-600, full_detailed=bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 to-blue-900, extensive_log=bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-900 via-slate-900 to-indigo-900
SuccessStories.jsx (line 274) correctly implements 4-column grid: 'grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4'
SuccessStories card headers use gradient: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900 to-slate-800 dark:from-slate-800 dark:to-slate-700'
Story text uses compact size: 'text-[11px]' with max-height scroll: 'max-h-28 overflow-y-auto'
Outcome footer has proper emerald styling: 'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/20'

landing_page.details: Page loads correctly with hero heading 'Criminal Appeal Research Tool', navigation elements visible

statistics_page.details: Page loads with heading 'Australian Appeal Statistics', 33 card elements found, no errors

details.header_band: bg-green-600 text-white p-5 sm:p-6 CONFIRMED (Quick Summary)

details.case_overview: PRESENT - shows Defendant, Offence, Court, State, Generated date
